_doc: Modern Masters (MMA) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/mma.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 60U / 53R / 15M. Collation: sequential, C1/C2 common collation. Notes: Masters reprint set. Large set, normal size for its era. Every pack guarantees a foil. Most marketing/ad cards have a token or emblem on the front face. Printed in USA. 24 packs per box.
